meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing clients with empty hands. The Antigravity project template allows you to rapidly scaffold production-grade SaaS MVPs. By leveraging Claude Code, you can transform architectural concepts into functional, revenue-ready repositories in minutes, effectively bridging the portfolio gap and proving your technical authority to high-value prospects immediately.
content.intro:
The silence of a zero-project portfolio is deafening when you are pitching for your first big contract. You possess the vision and the drive, but the market demands proof of execution. Most founders waste weeks agonizing over boilerplate code, missing the window of opportunity while their competitors ship.

It is time to pivot from 'aspiring' to 'shipping'. The Antigravity framework, combined with the raw power of Claude Code, acts as a force multiplier for your development cycle. This isn't just about writing code; it's about architecting a professional showcase that signals to the world that you are a builder who delivers.

steps.title: Define Your SaaS Vertical
steps.description: Identify a high-CPM niche where a simple tool solves a burning pain. This will be your portfolio's centerpiece.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a project structure for a B2B SaaS tool that solves [insert niche problem] with focus on Auth, DB integration, and Stripe API.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize a new project scaffold for a SaaS MVP targeting [niche] using the Antigravity template.'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Core Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate, ensuring clean separation of concerns and production readiness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up the backend architecture using the Antigravity standard, including folder structure, environment config, and base API handlers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Review the generated boilerplate and ensure all environment variables are correctly mapped for local development.'

steps.title: Integrate Identity and Payments
steps.description: A portfolio project without Auth and Payments is just a script. Make it a business.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add authentication logic via Clerk and payment integration via Stripe Checkout to the Antigravity project.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the Stripe webhook handler and secure the API routes using Clerk.'

steps.title: Build the High-Conversion UI
steps.description: Focus on a clean, professional dashboard that demonstrates you understand UX fundamentals.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive dashboard layout using Tailwind CSS that displays core metrics and user-specific data.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a responsive dashboard component and wire it to the mock user data service.'

steps.title: Documentation and Deployment
steps.description: Your portfolio piece is only as good as its documentation. Treat it like a product launch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive README.md including architecture diagrams, setup instructions, and the business value proposition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Finalize the project documentation and create a deployment script for Vercel.'

pro_tips: Treat your GitHub repo like a sales landing page; the README is your most important marketing asset.
Always include a 'Future Roadmap' section in your README to show potential clients you think in terms of product evolution.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your critical path; nothing screams 'senior developer' like a 90%+ test coverage badge.
Record a 60-second Loom video demonstrating the product and embed it in your portfolio site to increase conversion by 300%.
Never build a generic 'To-Do' list; build a 'Vertical-Specific SaaS' that solves a real, painful business problem.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, push it to your GitHub, write a brief 'Build Log' post on LinkedIn/X tagging the technologies used, and start reaching out to prospects in your chosen niche.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be a founder. You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap. The only thing missing is your first commit. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
